evidence: Workflow gates execute local unit/frontend/build/inventory/CLI/compose-config commands only.
No HTTP probes against live domains were added to .github/workflows/python-ci.yml.
ci-api-contract target enforces tests/unit/test_api_ops_routes.py and tests/unit/test_api_ops_analytics.py.
ci-deterministic requires ci-api-contract before full unit gate runs.
Default CI does not claim browser-green status while task-8 browser path remains blocked.
README now states Playwright coverage is outside default deterministic gate until blocker clearance.
Compose validation uses .env.qa.example for deterministic config rendering without requiring live credentials.
Frontend scenario inventory validation is wired into frontend test:deterministic and default CI.

residual_non_ci_blockers: Task-8 browser-path blocker remains outside default CI and still requires dedicated remediation before making Playwright mandatory.
